name: Leadfeeder
description: Reverse-IP visitor identification — turns anonymous website traffic into named B2B accounts. Killer signal: companies actively researching you = warm AI-prospection target.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API token
credential_fields.description: Leadfeeder API token from app.leadfeeder.com → Account → Personal API token

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List Leadfeeder accounts (subscriptions) accessible by the token.

tools.name: list_leads
tools.description: List identified visitor companies (leads) for an account, with filters.

tools.name: lead_visits
tools.description: Get the visits (page-by-page) for a single lead. Strong context for the outreach intro.

tools.name: lead_contacts
tools.description: Get available contacts (employees) for an identified company-lead.

tools.name: list_custom_feeds
tools.description: List custom views (saved filters) for an account.
